jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd family as a Curriculum Developer in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khan Academy India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
